name: agent-teams
description: 协调多个 AI Agent（Codex、Claude Code、Gemini）作为团队协作，支持共享任务列表与代理间消息传递

scripts.build:ui: cd ui && npm install && npm run build
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm run test:run && npm run prepare:publish
scripts.prepack: npm run build && npm run prepare:publish
scripts.version: npm run build && npm run prepare:publish && git add -A dist
scripts.publish:patch: npm run prepublish:check && npm version patch && npm publish
scripts.publish:minor: npm run prepublish:check && npm version minor && npm publish
scripts.publish:major: npm run prepublish:check && npm version major && npm publish
scripts.publish:dry-run: npm run build && npm run prepare:publish && npm pack --dry-run
scripts.prepublish: npm run build && npm run prepare:publish
